texto: In the new century science will defeat famine, boredom, and the plague, but . . . vital knowledge will become so elevated that nobody will know how anything works. . . . the good news is that everybody will be empowered; the bad news is nobody will understand why.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Christensen sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “In the new century science will defeat famine, boredom, and the plague, but . . . vital knowledge…” articula sabedoria, knowledge, science em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e science.
